quotes.text: If you need an API key to use your AI, it doesn't really belong to you
quotes.speaker: Paolo Ardoino

quotes.text: Every single AI agent will have a wallet within 15 years
quotes.speaker: Paolo Ardoino

quotes.text: We are going to have one trillion agents transacting in bitcoin and stablecoins
quotes.speaker: Paolo Ardoino

quotes.text: AI should empower the next wave of growth for society and humanity, not delegate even more control to corporations
quotes.speaker: Paolo Ardoino

quotes.text: Trillions of self-custodial wallets. No string attached. Pure freedom.
quotes.speaker: Paolo Ardoino

quotes.text: Unstoppable peer-to-peer network of billions of AI agents

italian_phrases.translation: This is how football was always supposed to be.

italian_phrases.text: La curva dove gli ultras stanno insieme e' ora la curva dove i tifosi di tutto il mondo stanno insieme.
italian_phrases.translation: The curve where ultras stand together is now the curve where fans worldwide stand together.
